title: Rich Men's Wives
writer: Agnes Christine Johnston, Lois Zellner, Frank Mitchell Dazey
actors: House Peters, Claire Windsor, Rosemary Theby
plot: Wealthy John and Gay Masters lead a busy social life to the neglect of their son, Jackie. Also feeling herself slighted, Gay innocently flirts with Juan Camillo but is caught in a compromising situation and is sent away by John. G...
